touches.ai_summary: Cold call attempt to Rowan Hall at BrightVision. No answer, left voicemail introducing our sales automation platform and mentioning potential to improve rep productivity.
Cold email sent to Rowan Hall highlighting how our platform helps mid-market sales teams automate workflows and increase rep efficiency. No response received.

LinkedIn message to Rowan Hall referencing BrightVision's recent growth and offering a brief conversation about sales automation. Rowan responded positively, expressing interest in learning more about rep productivity solutions.

questions_asked.question: What kind of productivity improvements are you seeing with your customers?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 20-30% time savings on manual data entry and follow-up tasks

next_steps: Schedule qualification call

touches.ai_summary: Initial qualification call with Rowan Hall, Head of Sales. Discussed current challenges with rep productivity and manual workflow bottlenecks. Rowan shared that their 10-person sales team spends significant time on administrative tasks. Confirmed budget range and decision-making process.

questions_asked.question: What are your biggest pain points with current sales processes?
questions_asked.answer: Reps spend too much time on data entry and follow-ups instead of selling

questions_asked.question: Who else would be involved in evaluating a solution like this?
questions_asked.answer: IT and RevOps would need to be involved for technical evaluation

next_steps: Follow-up call to dive deeper into use cases
Rowan to introduce IT and RevOps stakeholders

touches.ai_summary: Second qualification call with Rowan. Walked through specific automation workflows needed for the team. Rowan confirmed timeline of 2-3 months and mentioned the unlimited automation tier would be most relevant given their growth plans.

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM and email tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with all major CRMs and email platforms

next_steps: Schedule discovery call with broader team
Send integration documentation

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call with Rowan. Mapped out detailed workflow requirements and discussed how automation would impact the team's daily activities. Rowan mentioned they're building the business case internally and want to involve Diego from IT and Sebastian from RevOps soon.

questions_asked.question: What does success look like for this initiative in 6 months?
questions_asked.answer: Reps spending 50% less time on admin work and hitting activity targets more consistently

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take?
questions_asked.answer: Standard implementation is 2-3 weeks with training included

next_steps: Schedule demo with full team including IT and RevOps
Rowan to confirm stakeholder availability

touches.ai_summary: Product demo with Rowan Hall (champion). Walked through core automation workflows, CRM integration, and rep productivity dashboards. Rowan was engaged and asked detailed questions about specific use cases. Diego Davis (IT) and Sebastian Garcia (RevOps) were invited but did not attend. Rowan mentioned leadership is supportive but hasn't formally introduced an executive sponsor yet.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the automation rules for different rep segments?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, you can create custom rule sets by team, region, or individual rep

questions_asked.question: What kind of reporting does the platform provide?
questions_asked.answer: Real-time dashboards for activity, automation performance, and time savings metrics

questions_asked.question: Will we be able to get Diego and Sebastian on the next call to review technical requirements?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I'll make sure they're available for the proposal discussion

objections: Need to ensure our IT team reviews security and compliance requirements before moving forward
next_steps: Send demo recording and technical documentation
Schedule proposal call with IT and RevOps
Rowan to share feedback with leadership

touches.ai_summary: Proposal call with Rowan to review pricing and package options. Discussed 10-seat unlimited automation plan at $9,800 ACV. Rowan expressed concern about getting budget approval without executive visibility. Asked about contract flexibility and implementation timeline.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on annual vs quarterly payment terms?
questions_asked.answer: We can offer quarterly billing with a small upfront payment

questions_asked.question: Who needs to approve the budget for this purchase?
questions_asked.answer: VP of Sales has final approval, but I'm building the case with Finance as well

objections: Budget approval process might take longer than expected without VP directly involved
next_steps: Send formal proposal document
Schedule exec meeting with VP of Sales
Rowan to coordinate internal stakeholder alignment

touches.ai_summary: Executive alignment meeting with Rowan Hall. VP of Sales was scheduled but did not attend due to a last-minute conflict. Rowan presented the business case and walked through expected ROI. Meeting focused on validating the value proposition and timeline. Rowan committed to rescheduling with the VP but expressed urgency to move forward.

questions_asked.question: What's the VP's biggest concern about this type of investment?
questions_asked.answer: Making sure we see measurable productivity gains and that reps actually adopt the tool

questions_asked.question: Do you offer any performance guarantees or ROI commitments?
questions_asked.answer: We provide adoption support and success metrics tracking, but no formal performance guarantees

questions_asked.question: What happens if we need to scale beyond 10 seats in the first year?
questions_asked.answer: You can add seats mid-contract at a prorated rate based on your current plan

next_steps: Rowan to reschedule with VP of Sales
Finalize proposal with updated payment terms
Begin security review with IT

touches.ai_summary: Pricing and negotiation call with Rowan. Discussed final contract terms, payment structure, and implementation timeline. Rowan requested a small discount to help with internal approval but acknowledged pricing is fair. Still working on getting VP of Sales engaged directly. Diego and Sebastian have been looped in asynchronously but haven't joined live discussions.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on pricing given we're committing to annual?
questions_asked.answer: We can offer a 5% discount for annual prepayment

questions_asked.question: When do you expect to have final sign-off from the VP?
questions_asked.answer: Hoping to get on their calendar next week, but their schedule has been unpredictable

next_steps: Send updated proposal with discount
Rowan to confirm VP meeting
Finalize security review with IT team

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent to Rowan recapping the pricing discussion and next steps. Confirmed 5% discount for annual prepayment and outlined final proposal terms. Rowan responded acknowledging receipt and committed to finalizing VP meeting by end of week.

questions_asked.question: Can you send over the updated MSA and security documentation for IT review?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, attaching both documents to this thread

next_steps: Wait for VP meeting confirmation
IT to complete security review
Prepare final contract
